reasoning: The question asks whether an "Israel x Iran ceasefire [is] broken by October 31". The criteria specify that it resolves to "Yes" if Israel initiates a drone, missile, or air strike on Iranian soil by 11:59 PM ET on the listed date, and it must be officially acknowledged by the relevant government or a consensus of credible reporting. On October 26, 2024, Israel officially launched a large-scale, retaliatory airstrike against Iranian military targets on Iranian soil (including Tehran, Ilam, and Khuzestan provinces). The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) officially and immediately acknowledged the strikes on X and in press statements, declaring they were conducting "precise strikes on military targets in Iran." Since this occurred before the October 31 cutoff, it unequivocally met the criteria for a "Yes" resolution.
